name: FC 26 Quiz
summary:
FC 26 Quiz is a browser based interactive live-stream trivia game designed for Twitch streamers. Players compete in real-time by guessing blurred football player cards
through the live chat. Each round presents a blurred football player card,
and viewers race to identify the player using visual clues like rating, position, and
card design. Faster correct guesses earn higher scores, with a live leaderboard
tracking all participants. The game features customizable round timers, hint systems
(letter reveals, league/nation/club info), promo card categories, multi-language
support and full streamer branding customization.

Live Play: Real-time viewer interaction via streaming platforms.
